items.briefing:
With tax time in full swing, Australian tax agents are being urged to tighten security on client login credentials, as criminals increasingly target these accounts to commit tax fraud. Separately, a new report highlights that AI adoption in Australia and New Zealand is outpacing the policies and rules organisations have in place to govern it safely — a gap that creates real risk if staff use AI tools without proper guidelines.

For online retailers, a new fraud detection app has launched for Shopify, offering some practical protection against payment fraud. **Practical tip:** If your organisation uses a tax agent or accounting platform, confirm with your provider that multi-factor authentication is enabled on your account.

featured.title: Why Australian tax agents need to secure every customer login to prevent the next wave of tax fraud
featured.quote: Tax agents must secure logins to prevent fraud targeting Australian taxpayers and the ATO.
